programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer and Jonathan go undercover to identify a toy plan thief who has become a murderer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey try to uncover the connection between 3 strangled women and an adult telephone line

programme.title: Starsky 318

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke Dominic and Caitlin are asked to help to break an innocent man out of prison during wish Hawke gets captured in the process

programme.title: Friday the 13Th The Series
programme.desc: A girl finds a compact mirror that has the power to make others adore her and uses the cursed object to seek revenge against her sister

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Addams Family 130
programme.desc: Addams Family 130

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George opens a gas station and he makes the mistake of hiring Amos

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos sneaks into an air base to complain about jet noise over the farm and accidentally touches classified material so when Luke and Kate come looking for Grandpa they are all suspected of espionage

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble is in Connecticut working for a man who is conspiring with his mistress to murder his wife and blame it on him

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful waitress marries the owner of a lumber camp and then quickly starts to realize that he is not what she really wants

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A con artist meets and weds a wealthy old widows through a dating service then murders them and takes the inheritance finally gets the date of his dreams - the very worst of them

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick suspects a cover-up in the attempted rape of a police captains wife and her subsequent shooting of the attacker

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A dentist uses a cursed electric chair to seek revenge against those who wronged him

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the gossip-monger postman who has witnessed George McMichaels will lets it slip that Lukes family benefits substantially Luke Kate and the children engage in excessively fawning behavior toward George to the disgust of Amos

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen Burkhalter requisitions the famous Édouard Manet painting The Fife Player from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics Hogan and LeBeau decide to steal it back

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Mchale 331
programme.desc: Mchale 331

programme.title: Mchale 316
programme.desc: Mchale 316

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Faded singer Ginny Gordons comeback is threatened and her sanity imperiled by attempts on her life Is her former partner responsible for the attempts or is a recent acquaintance terrorizing her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When his boss goes out of town Michael volunteers Stephanie to run her girl scout troupe but the girls arent interested in Stephanies shallow and materialistic ways and Stephanie is horrified to learn shes expected to go camping with them

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick goes to a dude ranch for his vacation

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Problems arise when a Marine pen pal Robin has been communicating with via mail for a while shows up thinking Polly is Robin since Robin sent him Pollys picture instead After Craig and Holowachuk overhear the two at the officers club they think Polly and the pen pal are running away together and set about trying to stop it

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: To catch a killer of a phone-sex operator Ryan has to work undercover as one in spite of her personal abhorrence of the job

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading Meanwhile a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison is kidnapped by a unique modern artist named Quinn whos actually one of the aliens being hunted by his kind Hes mysteriously immune to Earths bacteria so the other aliens want to learn his secret through dissection Quinn wants to set up a dialogue with Earths leaders to arrange a peaceful takeover of the planet as opposed to an all-out slaughter of humanity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Ann Fisk decides to confront the Swamp Thing that he is in actuality Dr Alec Holland

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A recent storm in the swamp uncovers a car wreck from ten years agoincluding the married couples ghosts that think only hours have passed

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Dorcans demand that Moonbase Alpha hand over Maya so that the use of her brain stem can continue their immortal existence

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.desc: Stone pursues a killer who shot an officer about to retire in three days; guests Tim OConnor Eileen Heckart

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is befriended by a troubled woman who gets him a job working in a veterinary clinic Her involvement with a no-good carny worker brings him trouble and the attention of her guardian a former cop who thinks he recognizes Kimble

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes life is saved by a marshal who hires him as a deputy The marshal is headed to the town of South Ford to arrest a man wanted for murder in Kansas The reception they receive is chilly with Cheyenne questioning his decision

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Racing across the country from LA to New York a plethora of exotic cars carry contestants hoping to win a very large sum

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The K Victoria Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby believes that MAD is behind the theft of several military planes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Stench an agent of MAD has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible making it valueless Inspector Gadget guards the national gold reserve at Fort Bucks
